name: Mustard Batter Bass
recipeIngredient: 3/8 cup Dijon mustard, or prepared mustard
2 1/4 pounds bass fillets, cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine mustard, water (2 tablespoons), lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and cayenne pepper.
2. Place the seasoned coating mix in a shallow dish.
3. Dip each fish piece first into the mustard mixture, then dredge it in the coating mix to coat evenly.
4. Heat 1/2 inch of oil over medium heat in a 10-inch skillet.
5. Add the fish pieces to the hot oil.
6. Fry for three to four minutes, or until golden brown, turning once.
7. Drain on a plate lined with paper towels.
